title: payment.rs HAPPY_ANCHOR_HEIGHT test constant undocumented — testnet NU5 activation height magic number
description: payment.rs test helper uses: const HAPPY_ANCHOR_HEIGHT: u64 = 2_000_001; with comment 'past NU5 activation on testnet (1_842_420) so the builder emits a v5 transaction'. The constant value (2_000_001) is correct but is a magic number with no cross-reference to where 1_842_420 comes from. The NU5 testnet activation height (1_842_420) is not in a named constant anywhere in the codebase — a future contributor would not know why 2_000_001 was chosen or how much margin to leave. The constant should either reference a named NU5_TESTNET_ACTIVATION or have a comment like '// NU5 activates at 1_842_420 on testnet; use 2_000_001 for 100K-block margin'.
